examples: The main minerals are plagioclase, zoisite, hornblende, and the minor minerals were mica, sphene, prehnite and so on.
The main minerals are plagioclase, zoisite, hornblende , and the minor minerals were mica, sphene, prehnite, tourmaline and so on.
Firstly, the pigment prepared by presynthesized tin sphene was obtained and has a good colour development. Theorical evidence was found by coprecipitation method.
